review_title: The perfect software for building the perfect Chat Bot
author: Kesav S.
pros: I would say I like the flexibility and features the software offers. The option of either using UI for building a bot or completely sticking to coding is just simply amazing.
cons: Keeping track of journey flow in the bot.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Strong conversational AI product with excellent tech and support service.
description: The Yellow.ai team has been very helpful in building the customised chatbot as per our business use case and enhancing the customer experience. The deployment of the product was very smooth and the team took the utmost care to ensure the business use case is met and the product is timely deployed. The team has always stepped forward to understand our business challenges and provide us solutions, whether it has been to integrate new systems or resolve any issues with the bot. Overall experience with the Yellow.ai product and the team has been excellent so far.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The product provided us with ease of integration with existing systems and with new systems. It is customisable as per our business requirement. The service provided by the team is excellent and they are available 24/7 to help us with any business challenges or tech issues.
cons: The product doesn't provide ease of new journey creation or editing existing journeys. For any change in journey or communication it requires additional tech effort.

review_title: Chat Bot Platform for Professionals
description: Overall experience is good and I would highly recommend it to professionals who want to connect with their client/customer in real time.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Real time chatting with customer, file sharing, conversations, quick replies. Provide detailed reports of conversations, messages and agent activity. It has some of very useful features like quick agent switching & ticket filtering option to analyze the data.
cons: You can not download ticket data for more than 30 days and this is limitation I don't like to have any software.

review_title: Must use product by your Customer Success Team!
description: The overall experience has been really good. The cherry on the top is their brilliant and supportive customer support & account managers which makes my life very easy :)
author: Amit A.
pros: Insanely easy to set up, operate & use. Adding to this, they have an excellent support team to help you out in all possible scenarios. They have a very reasonable pricing model, which depends on your overall usage of the product.
cons: Nothing as such. I love it : ) Few technical scopes of improvements feature-wise, but these are very well catered in their ever-evolving roadmap, so don't have to worry.

review_title: Easy to deploy multi channel conversational AI
description: We embarked on a journey to be omni-present across multiple digital touch points with our customers. This aspiration needed to be balanced without adding unjustifiable headcount. We partnered with Yellow, who introduced us to conversational AI. This has opened up opportunities in revenue gen, customer service and grievance management using a single deployment, rather than having disparate tools, all hastily put together by archaic integrations architectures
author: Arvind T.
pros: Multi-language/ multi channel support, ease of design and deployment, solid implementation and customer success teams.
cons: Reporting dashboard and logins can be better on UX

review_title: Yellow.ai fixed our customer feedback system issues
description: We switched from Arabot to Yellow.ai. Support is very good. No break down of software. Works smoothly.
author: Kabeer K.
pros: Ease of usability. No Code Platform No dependency on vendor
cons: Integration limitations especially no built in connector for SQL

review_title: A powerful conversational AI platform
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: -Yellow.ai is super easy to use and offers a lot of channels to work with (Whatsapp , GBM, Text..) -Their AI-powered assistant can handle a wide range of customer inquiries and issues, which frees more of the CS time but also can be very versatile and sales/ marketing oriented The platform's analytics and reporting features are pretty decent, giving you insights on customer behaviour and feedback, and allowing you to make data-driven decisions to improve your customer experience.- easy to build chatbot (no code needed)
cons: --The platform can be a bit pricey compared to some other AI-powered customer service solutions, so it may not be the best fit for businesses with a limited budget.-Customer support can be slow to respond to inquiries or issues, which can be frustrating if you need help right away.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Yellow.ai is an innovative platform with various concepts of Bot building
description: It is great experience to provide seamless experience to our customers
author: Vishal K.
pros: 1. Customisation 2. Scalability 3. Multi Language Support 4. Integration
cons: 1. Ease of use 2. Customer Support 3. Intermittent Inconsistency of the bot

review_title: Helps Smoothen the Customer Experience
author: Indira V.
pros: Ease of use and scalability are the main reasons we love and continue to use Yellow Messenger
cons: Some critical features that are available in Messenger are not available in Cloud yet

review_title: HappY Customer
author: Stephen S.
pros: Ready to Use SAAS, Easy to integrate, User Friendly
cons: Cost on all the Services could be less ..

review_title: review of yellow messenger
description: Its good.... i learned a lot using yellow messenger
author: gnanaseela P.
pros: features, ease design flow, easy deployment, connecting to DB
cons: I am non coder, i faced problems in coding part.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Yellow messenger Review
description: A lot easy in making for Chat BOT.
author: Vivek A.
pros: User Friendly and easy to understand and liked easy testing environment
cons: Coding part can be integrated within Yellow messenger
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Improve Customer Journey Through Yellow AI’s Chatbot and AI Technology
description: I am very much pleased with how Yellow AI over the years had delivered our requirement and is still continuing to provide positive impact on volume management. With Yellow AI we were able to deflect 50% of our tickets with 95% CSAT.
author: John Epok P.
pros: - integratable to major ticketing platforms e.g. Zendesk, Freshworks, etc - intuitive chat widget, highly customizable - able to put banners, and trigger proactive chat - core strength on SEA regional language and dialect - resonable pricing - proactive and supportive support and success team - user-friendly platform on flow creation and troubleshooting
cons: - some configurations would need tech background e.g. integration to Zendesk

review_title: Review on HR Bot after using for more than 1 year
description: Overall the product meets our expectations and we are happy to be partnered with Yellow Messenger on this journey to improve employee experience on internal support, employee engagement
author: Sateesh R.
pros: + Integration with internal systems + Scalability to meet our requirements with new features + Service from the team + Chat agent and agent ticketing
cons: + User experience needs improvement + Multiple levels of permissions inbuilt for HR bot ( currently does not have common roles like an employee, Manager, HR, etc). It has user, admin, chat agent + Better reporting on the usage and quality of the chat responses

review_title: Yellow Messenger Chat got
description: Overall a Good partner but if the phone app if the bugs are fixed then it would be greater
author: Dharaneesh E.
pros: The Chatbot that responds timely and spontaneously with customer and the own Template creation for Commerce Marketing is the most likely feature
cons: The chatbot at time doesn't identify the customer and the ticket creation gets missed though the Data base is provided

review_title: Yellow.ai Assessment - Conversational Commerce & Live Agent System
description: The Overall experience was great and truly outstanding. All the integrations between Yellow.ai platform and our E-commerce system has been done smoothly handled by professional team from Yellow.ai. Since our company is new to Conversational Commerce and live agent system, working with Yellow.ai team has allowed us to gain understanding of its value to our brand and be able to apply this features smoothly in our business.
author: Mirza J.
pros: Easy to use, User friendly. Customer Segmentations can be done easily. All in one platform to for customer support. Able to run WhatsApp campaigns smoothly.
cons: It is hard to say since we our overall experience was good with Yellow.ai platform and their team. In the start we face some issue when running the campaign since it was in a early stage but after that no issues were faced.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Yellow Messenger becomes Yellow.ai with the same issues
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: While the product was easy to install it was too childish and immature for a paying audience. It was hard as an interface for agents to grasp and we had to kill the project after investing several hours in making the product work.
cons: The interface to chat and linking multiple channels was broken.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: They make it impossible to leave
description: They have been making it very hard to move on. They hold your WhatsApp number and make it very cumbersome to migrate to anyone else. Simple requests take days to get a response. They have some much red tape. We have been trying to leave for days now, and nothing has moved. It's best to avoid them.
author: Abhay R.
pros: It really isn't any better than the competition in any way
cons: Not a stable platform. They have outages often, ruining our SLAs every now and then.

review_title: Platform that can fuel conversational commerce
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ease of setup, and good API support for integration.
cons: Console design, analytics and the mobile platform can get better

review_title: One solution for your WhatsApp chatbot requirements
author: Amit G.
pros: Features, AI chatbot, pricing of the yellow.ai were remarkably better than the other software that I evaluated
cons: Nothing as of now. We did the integration, have built 3 chatbots so far, everything is working as anticipated
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Highly recommend Yellow.ai chat bots
description: It was really great working with team Yellow.ai. We have installed their BOT service in our Dubai based ecommerce site babystore.ae. [SENSITIVE CONTENT] has shown great support throughout the implementation. Looking forward to work with them in more extended way.
author: Lekha T.
pros: Easy to communicate with customers from different mediums. Was able to fully track their behavior flow over chat bot.
cons: Nothing. Everything is working as of now.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A perfect solution for operational efficiency
author: Prafulla P.
pros: A major chunk of the incoming volume is handled by the bot itself. Only interactions which absolutely require human interactions are routed to the operations team, This has increased efficiency multifolds
cons: Bit more features into the live chat agent dashboard and more focus on reports.

review_title: Yellow ai with Colorbar
author: Neharika S.
pros: Easy to understand and the way they communicate with user
cons: Need to be improve in reporting section .

review_title: Great Softwarer
author: Aishwary A.
pros: It has great UI & is easy to implement. It has eased our work.
cons: None. The product is great & has improved overtime.

review_title: Driving Digital sales : AI- Chat Bot Yellow.AI
description: The over- all experience has been good, the Yellow.ai team has helped in implementation of the project in all the possible.
author: Kushagra T.
pros: Choice of diverse vernacular languages & flexibility of the team to implement customizations.
cons: N/A as product is in implementation state.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
